case_title: WILSON, HENRY vs. COOPER, FRED et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILSON, HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOPER, FRED THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 MASON ST #623, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, FRED
ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL NOV-15-1994, $76.00 DEPOSITED AS RENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE DRV IS $10.93 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, HENRY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, FRED DOES 1-4 SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, FRED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, HENRY SERVED OCT-17-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, FRED
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $76.00 FOR TRANSACTION 1B08P1270000 (EX PARTE MOTION), PAYABLE TO HENRY WILSON, WARRANT #00015102, DATED NOV-17-1994
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT COOPER, FRED ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, FRED
